name: Chantilly Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Refrigerate the mixing bowl and beaters until well chilled; at least 30 minutes.
2. Combine cream, vanilla, brandy, and Grand Marnier in the chilled bowl.
3. Beat with electric mixer on medium speed for 1 minute.
4. Add sugar and sour cream, and beat on medium just until soft peaks form, about 3 minutes.
5. Do not over-beat.
